whats_new.title: Amazon EC2 network/EBS instances now available in additional regions
whats_new.description: Starting today, Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) R8in, R8ib, R8idn, and R8idb instances are available in the AWS Asia Pacific (Tokyo) and Europe (Frankfurt, Ireland) regions. These instances are powered by custom sixth generation Intel Xeon Scalable processors, available only on AWS and feature the latest sixth generation AWS Nitro cards. These instances deliver up to 43% better compute p
whats_new.description_vi: Các instance EC2 R8in, R8ib, R8idn và R8idb hiện khả dụng tại các region bổ sung — Từ hôm nay, Amazon EC2 R8in, R8ib, R8idn và R8idb instances đã có sẵn tại AWS Asia Pacific (Tokyo) và Europe (Frankfurt, Ireland).

whats_new.title: Amazon EMR on EKS now supports Apache Spark troubleshooting agent
whats_new.description: Amazon EMR on EKS now supports the Apache Spark troubleshooting agent. Data engineers can now diagnose EMR on EKS job failures through natural language, receiving automated root cause analysis and PySpark code recommendations without manually navigating distributed logs and Spark History Server data. The agent analyzes Spark History Server data, distributed executor logs, and cluster configuration
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EMR on EKS hỗ trợ Apache Spark troubleshooting agent — Amazon EMR on EKS giờ hỗ trợ Apache Spark troubleshooting agent, cho phép data engineers chẩn đoán sự cố EMR on EKS job thông qua ngôn ngữ tự nhiên và nhận root cause tự động.

whats_new.title: Amazon Location Service enhances Places APIs with new address and search options
whats_new.description: Today, Amazon Location Service announced new enhancements to its Places APIs that give developers greater control over address name formatting, multilingual address, travel-optimized POI search, and drive-through data. These capabilities span the Geocode, ReverseGeocode, GetPlace, Suggest, Autocomplete, SearchNearby, and SearchText APIs. Developers can now control how address component names are r
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Location Service nâng cao Places APIs với các tùy chọn địa chỉ và tìm kiếm mới — Amazon Location Service công bố các cải tiến mới cho Places APIs, cho developers quyền kiểm soát tốt hơn định dạng tên địa chỉ, hỗ trợ đa ngôn ngữ và tối ưu cho du lịch.

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod now supports AMI-based node lifecycle configuration for Slurm clusters using continuous provisioning
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod now supports AMI-based configuration for Slurm clusters that use continuous provisioning. Continuous provisioning adds nodes to the cluster as capacity becomes available, and this launch extends AMI-based configuration to clusters using this mode. With this support, clusters using continuous provisioning can be created without downloading, configuring, or uploading lifecy
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod hỗ trợ cấu hình vòng đời node dựa trên AMI cho Slurm clusters — Amazon SageMaker HyperPod giờ hỗ trợ cấu hình dựa trên AMI cho Slurm clusters với continuous provisioning, tự động thêm node khi dung lượng cần thiết.

whats_new.title: Amazon EC2 G7 instances are now available in the AWS US East (N. Virginia) Region
whats_new.description: Starting today, Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) G7 instances powered by NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs are now available in US East (N. Virginia) Region. G7 instances deliver up to 4.6x AI inference performance and up to 2.1 graphics performance compared to G6 instances. G7 instances also deliver faster performance for GPU-accelerated data analytics workloads. Customer
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EC2 G7 instances hiện khả dụng tại AWS US East (N. Virginia) Region — Từ hôm nay, Amazon EC2 G7 instances được hỗ trợ bởi NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs đã có sẵn tại US East (N. Virginia).

whats_new.title: AWS DMS Schema Conversion now supports offline SQL Server conversion
whats_new.description: AWS Database Migration Service (DMS) Schema Conversion now supports offline source conversion for Microsoft SQL Server, enabling you to convert SQL Server schemas and code without direct connectivity to your source databases. You extract metadata using standard database commands in your own environment, then upload it to DMS Schema Conversion for processing. This eliminates security reviews, firew
whats_new.description_vi: AWS DMS Schema Conversion hỗ trợ chuyển đổi SQL Server ngoại tuyến — AWS Database Migration Service (DMS) Schema Conversion giờ hỗ trợ chuyển đổi nguồn ngoại tuyến cho Microsoft SQL Server, cho phép chuyển đổi schema và code mà không cần kết nối.

whats_new.title: Amazon EC2 I7ie instances now available in AWS Asia Pacific (Hyderabad) region
whats_new.description: AWS is announcing starting today, Amazon EC2 I7ie instances are now available in AWS Asia Pacific (Hyderabad) region. Designed for large storage I/O intensive workloads, I7ie instances are powered by 5th Gen Intel Xeon Processors with an all-core turbo frequency of 3.2 GHz, offering up to 40% better compute performance and 20% better price performance over existing I3en instances. I7ie instances o
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EC2 I7ie instances hiện khả dụng tại AWS Asia Pacific (Hyderabad) region — AWS công bố Amazon EC2 I7ie instances đã có sẵn tại AWS Asia Pacific (Hyderabad), được thiết kế cho các khối lượng công việc I/O lưu trữ lớn.

whats_new.title: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) now supports R8g.24xlarge and R8g.48xlarge instances
whats_new.description: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) now supports R8g.24xlarge and R8g.48xlarge database instances. R8g instances are powered by AWS Graviton4 processors and feature DDR5 memory, enabling customers to achieve higher throughput and support larger working sets in memory. With R8g.24xlarge (96 vCPUs, 768 GiB memory) and R8g.48xlarge (192 vCPUs, 1,536 GiB memory), customers can run more dema
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon DocumentDB hỗ trợ R8g.24xlarge và R8g.48xlarge instances — Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) giờ hỗ trợ R8g.24xlarge và R8g.48xlarge database instances, được hỗ trợ bởi AWS Graviton4 processors với DDR5.

whats_new.title: AWS DMS Schema Conversion now supports AI agent automation
whats_new.description: AWS Database Migration Service (DMS) Schema Conversion now supports AI agent automation through the AWS MCP Server. You can connect AI coding agents, including Kiro, Claude Code, and Cursor, to DMS Schema Conversion and run complete migration workflows using natural language directly from your IDE. Agents create projects, browse source metadata, convert schemas, generate assessment reports, and ex
whats_new.description_vi: AWS DMS Schema Conversion hỗ trợ tự động hóa AI agent — AWS Database Migration Service (DMS) Schema Conversion giờ hỗ trợ tự động hóa AI agent thông qua AWS MCP Server, cho phép kết nối các AI coding agents như Kiro, Claude Code.

whats_new.title: AWS Organizations now applies account departure security controls by default for new organizations created via AWS Organizations console
whats_new.description: AWS Organizations now automatically applies security controls by default when you create a new organization via AWS Organizations console, simplifying initial security configuration by automatically applying core security controls. This approach safeguards multi-account environments by protecting against unintended member account departures from your organization. CloudOps administrators and centr
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Organizations áp dụng security controls mặc định cho các tổ chức mới — AWS Organizations giờ tự động áp dụng security controls khi bạn tạo tổ chức mới qua AWS Organizations console, đơn giản hóa cấu hình bảo mật ban đầu.

whats_new.title: OAuth support for the AWS MCP Server
whats_new.description: You can now connect AI agents directly to the AWS MCP Server using AWS Sign-In. Agents connect using industry-standard OAuth without requiring additional authentication software. Existing AWS identities, sign-in methods, IAM permissions, and governance controls you have already set up continue to apply. Developers can authorize agents interactively through a browser or programmatically using non-i
whats_new.description_vi: OAuth support cho AWS MCP Server — Bạn giờ có thể kết nối AI agents trực tiếp tới AWS MCP Server sử dụng AWS Sign-In, sử dụng OAuth tiêu chuẩn công nghiệp mà không cần phần mềm xác thực bổ sung.

whats_new.title: Amazon EC2 I8g instances now available in AWS GovCloud (US) regions
whats_new.description: AWS is announcing the general availability of Amazon EC2 Storage Optimized I8g instances in AWS GovCloud (US East, US West) regions. I8g instances offer the best performance in Amazon EC2 for storage-intensive workloads. I8g instances are powered by AWS Graviton4 processors that deliver up to 60% better compute performance compared to previous generation I4g instances. I8g instances use the latest
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EC2 I8g instances hiện khả dụng tại AWS GovCloud (US) regions — AWS công bố khả dụng chung của Amazon EC2 Storage Optimized I8g instances tại AWS GovCloud (US East, US West), cung cấp hiệu suất tốt nhất.

whats_new.title: Amazon EC2 now supports using an EBS volume for Replace Root Volume
whats_new.description: Today, AWS announces Replace Root Volume using an existing EBS volume, a new option for replacing the root volume of a running Amazon EC2 instance. Customers can now use an EBS volume as the target for a root volume replacement, in addition to the existing options of replacing from a snapshot or an AMI. This option supports customers running stateful workloads who need to include specific metadata
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon EC2 hỗ trợ sử dụng EBS volume để thay thế Root Volume — AWS công bố tính năng Replace Root Volume sử dụng EBS volume hiện có, cho phép khách hàng thay thế root volume của EC2 instance đang chạy.

whats_new.title: Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB now publishes database state change events to Amazon EventBridge
whats_new.description: Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB now publishes events to Amazon EventBridge when your database instances or clusters undergo state changes. Events are emitted for lifecycle operations including creation, deletion, compute and storage scaling, parameter group updates, maintenance windows, and reboot — covering both successful completions and failures. With this capability, customers can use Amazon Ev
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB xuất bản sự kiện thay đổi trạng thái cơ sở dữ liệu tới Amazon EventBridge — Amazon Timestream for InfluxDB giờ xuất bản sự kiện tới Amazon EventBridge khi database instances hoặc clusters trải qua thay đổi trạng thái.

whats_new.title: AWS Client VPN extends availability to four additional AWS Regions
whats_new.description: AWS Client VPN is now available in four new regions: Canada West (Calgary), Mexico (Central) and two in Asia Pacific - New Zealand and Taipei. This fully managed service enables customers to securely connect their remote workforce to resources in AWS or on-premises networks. AWS Client VPN eliminates the need for hardware VPN appliances and complex operational management through its pay-as-you-go
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Client VPN mở rộng khả dụng tới bốn AWS Regions bổ sung — AWS Client VPN giờ khả dụng tại bốn region mới: Canada West (Calgary), Mexico (Central) và hai ở Asia Pacific - New Zealand và Taipei.

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio adds custom asset types to the catalog in IAM-based domains
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio now supports custom asset types for IAM-based domains. With custom asset types, domain administrators can catalog any format of asset within the SageMaker Unified Studio, such as medical imaging files in Amazon S3, revenue dashboards built in PowerBI, or PDF research reports generated by a third-party platform. Custom asset types bring all assets, regardless of thei
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio thêm custom asset types vào catalog cho IAM-based domains — Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio giờ hỗ trợ custom asset types cho IAM-based domains, cho phép domain administrators catalog bất kỳ định dạng asset nào.

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod now supports deep health checks for Slurm clusters with continuous provisioning
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod now supports deep health checks for Slurm-orchestrated clusters created with continuous provisioning, enabling you to proactively verify GPU accelerator health on running instances at any time. Continuous provisioning lets you start training quickly and scale instance groups asynchronously without all-or-nothing failures, and you can now pair that flexibility with compreh
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker HyperPod hỗ trợ deep health checks cho Slurm clusters — Amazon SageMaker HyperPod giờ hỗ trợ deep health checks cho Slurm-orchestrated clusters, cho phép xác minh proactively GPU accelerators.

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker Feature Store now supports batch feature writes and record listing
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker Feature Store is a fully managed capability that makes it easy to compute, store, and retrieve features for training and deploying AI models. SageMaker Feature Store now supports new capabilities for high-throughput feature ingestion, record discovery, and offline store cataloging. Data scientists can now write multiple records across multiple feature groups in a single request wi
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker Feature Store hỗ trợ batch feature writes và record listing — Amazon SageMaker Feature Store hiện hỗ trợ batch feature writes và record listing, giúp dễ dàng tính toán, lưu trữ và truy xuất features.

whats_new.title: Amazon MSK Replicator now supports replication from external Apache Kafka clusters to MSK Standard brokers
whats_new.description: Amazon MSK Replicator now supports data replication from external Apache Kafka clusters - including on-premises, self-managed on AWS, or other cloud providers to Amazon MSK Standard brokers. This capability extends replication support to MSK Standard brokers, in addition to the existing support for MSK Express brokers. With this launch, you can migrate workloads to MSK Standard brokers, support di
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon MSK Replicator hỗ trợ replication từ external Apache Kafka clusters tới MSK Standard brokers — Amazon MSK Replicator giờ hỗ trợ sao chép dữ liệu từ external Apache Kafka clusters tới Amazon MSK Standard.

whats_new.title: AWS Config now supports 191 additional managed rules
whats_new.description: AWS Config now supports 191 additional managed rules across key services including Amazon Bedrock, Amazon SageMaker, Amazon ECS, Amazon EKS, Amazon RDS, Amazon Redshift, Amazon S3, and Amazon CloudTrail. This expansion increases built-in governance coverage across AI workloads and core cloud infrastructure. Examples of the new managed rules include evaluating resource configurations for encryption
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Config hỗ trợ 191 managed rules bổ sung — AWS Config giờ hỗ trợ 191 managed rules bổ sung cho các dịch vụ chính bao gồm Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker, ECS, EKS, RDS, Redshift, S3.

whats_new.title: AWS Builder Center Now Offers Free Sandbox Environments
whats_new.description: AWS Builder Center now lets builders request free, time-limited sandbox environments directly from eligible workshops, eliminating the need for a personal AWS account, credit card, or concerns about unexpected charges. Previously, workshops could only be completed using a builder's own AWS account. With sandbox environments, builders of all skill levels can safely deploy resources, write code, and
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Builder Center cung cấp môi trường Sandbox miễn phí — AWS Builder Center giờ cho phép builders yêu cầu miễn phí các sandbox environments từ eligible workshops mà không cần AWS account hoặc thẻ tín dụng.

whats_new.title: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio Workflows now supports operators for Amazon Bedrock, S3 Tables, S3 Vectors, and Glue Catalog
whats_new.description: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio Workflows now supports 19 new operators for Amazon Bedrock, Amazon S3 Tables, Amazon S3 Vectors, AWS Glue Data Catalog, and Amazon MWAA Serverless. With these operators, customers can add new tasks using the visual workflow creator to orchestrate these services without writing custom integration code. With this launch, data workers and builders can create workflows
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio Workflows hỗ trợ operators cho Amazon Bedrock, S3 Tables, S3 Vectors, Glue Catalog — Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio Workflows giờ hỗ trợ 19 operators mới cho Amazon Bedrock, S3 Tables, S3 Vectors, AWS Glue Data Catalog, Amazon MWAA.

whats_new.title: AWS Security Hub now offers Network Scanning to identify publicly reachable resources
whats_new.description: Today, AWS Security Hub introduces Network Scanning, a capability that identifies resources in your environment that are reachable from the public internet. Network Scanning probes your resources from the internet to detect actual reachability, not just what could be reachable based on security group rules and route tables. It discovers public IP addresses, virtual machines, and load balancers acr
whats_new.description_vi: AWS Security Hub cung cấp Network Scanning để xác định publicly reachable resources — AWS Security Hub giới thiệu Network Scanning, khả năng xác định resources trong environment có thể truy cập từ public internet.

whats_new.title: Amazon Redshift RG instances now available on the trailing track
whats_new.description: Amazon Redshift now supports Graviton-based RG instances on the trailing track . Starting July 7, 2026, rg.4xlarge and rg.xlarge instance types are available for customers running workloads on the trailing track (P201). The trailing track is designed for customers who prioritize stability for production workloads, running on a version already validated through the leading track. With RG instances
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Redshift RG instances hiện khả dụng trên trailing track — Amazon Redshift giờ hỗ trợ Graviton-based RG instances trên trailing track, từ 7/7/2026 rg.4xlarge và rg.xlarge khả dụng.

whats_new.title: Amazon Aurora DSQL change data capture (CDC) Is now generally available
whats_new.description: Amazon Aurora DSQL change data capture (CDC) is now generally available, enabling you to stream real-time database changes to Amazon Kinesis Data Streams for event-driven architectures and data integration workflows. Aurora DSQL CDC automatically captures the results of insert, update, and delete operations as change events and delivers them to Kinesis Data Streams with no infrastructure to manage
whats_new.description_vi: Amazon Aurora DSQL change data capture (CDC) hiện khả dụng chung — Amazon Aurora DSQL change data capture (CDC) hiện khả dụng chung, cho phép stream real-time database changes tới Amazon Kinesis Data Streams.

security.title: Ongoing updates on Copy.fail and variants
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-030-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 05/13/2026 10:00 PM PDT This is an ongoing issue. This bulletin will be updated as more information becomes available. Description: AWS is aware of the copy.fail or DirtyFrag class of issues - a set of privilege escalation issues affecting the Linux Kernel. We will update this bulletin as more infor
security.description_vi: Cập nhật liên tục về Copy.fail và các biến thể — Bulletin ID: 2026-030-AWS, Phạm vi: AWS, Loại: Quan trọng, Ngày xuất bản: 05/13/2026 10:00 PM PDT — Đây là vấn đề liên tục.

security.title: CVE-2026-13762 and CVE-2026-13763 - Issue with HTTP/2 multi-frame request body inspection in AWS WAF
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-048-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 06/29/2026 11:15 PM PDT Description: AWS WAF is a web application firewall that monitors the HTTP(S) requests that are forwarded to your protected web application resources. We identified CVE-2026-13762 and CVE-2026-13763, which are issues affecting HTTP/2 multi-frame request body inspection by AWS
security.description_vi: CVE-2026-13762 và CVE-2026-13763 - Vấn đề kiểm tra thân yêu cầu HTTP/2 multi-frame trong AWS WAF — Bulletin ID: 2026-048-AWS, Phạm vi: AWS, Loại: Quan trọng, Ngày xuất bản: 06/29/2026 11:15 PM PDT.

security.title: Issue with AWS-LC: an open-source, general-purpose cryptographic library (CVE-2026-3336, CVE-2026-3337, CVE-2026-3338)
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-005-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 2026/03/02 14:30 PM PST Description: AWS-LC is an open-source, general-purpose cryptographic library. We identified three distinct issues: - CVE-2026-3336: PKCS7_verify Certificate Chain Validation Bypass in AWS-LC Improper certificate validation in PKCS7_verify() in AWS-LC allows an unauthenticated
security.description_vi: Vấn đề với AWS-LC: thư viện mã hóa mục đích chung mã nguồn mở (CVE-2026-3336, CVE-2026-3337, CVE-2026-3338) — Bulletin ID: 2026-005-AWS, Ngày xuất bản: 2026/03/02 14:30 PM PST.

security.title: Issues with AWS Research and Engineering Studio (RES)
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-014-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 2026/04/06 14:00 PM PDT Description: Research and Engineering Studio (RES) on AWS is an open source, web portal design for administrators to create and manage secure cloud-based research and engineering environments. We have identified the following issues with the AWS Research and Engineering Studi
security.description_vi: Vấn đề với AWS Research and Engineering Studio (RES) — Bulletin ID: 2026-014-AWS, Ngày xuất bản: 2026/04/06 14:00 PM PDT.

security.title: Issue with FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP - MAC Address Validation Bypass and ICMP Echo Reply Integer Underflow
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-021-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 2026/04/29 12:00 PM PDT Description: FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP is a scalable, open source, and thread-safe TCP/IP stack for FreeRTOS. - CVE-2026-7422: Insufficient packet validation in the IPv4 and IPv6 receive paths allows an adjacent network device to send a packet that bypasses checksum and minimum-size
security.description_vi: Vấn đề với FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP - Bỏ qua xác thực MAC Address và Integer Underflow trong ICMP Echo Reply — Bulletin ID: 2026-021-AWS, Ngày xuất bản: 2026/04/29 12:00 PM PDT.

security.title: CVE-2026-13769 – Insecure file permissions in AWS CLI
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-049-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 07/01/2026 11:45 AM PDT Description: The AWS Command Line Interface (AWS CLI) is a unified tool for managing AWS services from the command line. We identified CVE-2026-13769 in AWS CLI on Unix-like systems where the umask has not been configured to restrict file permissions (the default on most syst
security.description_vi: CVE-2026-13769 – Quyền tệp không an toàn trong AWS CLI — Bulletin ID: 2026-049-AWS, Ngày xuất bản: 07/01/2026 11:45 AM PDT.

security.title: CVE-2026-12957 and CVE-2026-12958 - Issues in Language Servers for AWS and Amazon Q Developer Plugins
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-047-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 06/23/2026 09:30 AM PDT Description: Language Servers for AWS provide the underlying language-server runtime that powers Amazon Q Developer's AI coding assistance across its IDE plugins (Visual Studio Code, JetBrains, Eclipse, and Visual Studio). We identified CVE-2026-12957, an improper trust bound
security.description_vi: CVE-2026-12957 và CVE-2026-12958 - Vấn đề trong Language Servers cho AWS và Amazon Q Developer Plugins — Bulletin ID: 2026-047-AWS, Ngày xuất bản: 06/23/2026 09:30 AM PDT.

security.title: Security Findings in SageMaker Python SDK
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-004-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 2026/02/02 14:30 PM PST Description: CVE-2026-1777 - Exposed HMAC in SageMaker Python SDK SageMaker Python SDK’s remote functions feature uses a per‑job HMAC key to protect the integrity of serialized functions, arguments, and results stored in S3. We identified an issue where the HMAC secret key is
security.description_vi: Security Findings trong SageMaker Python SDK — Bulletin ID: 2026-004-AWS, Ngày xuất bản: 2026/02/02 14:30 PM PST — CVE-2026-1777 - Exposed HMAC.

security.title: Issue with Amazon SageMaker Python SDK - Model artifact integrity verification issues (CVE-2026-8596 & CVE-2026-8597)
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-031-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 05/14/2026 13:00 PM PDT Description: Amazon SageMaker Python SDK is an open-source library for training and deploying machine learning models on Amazon SageMaker. The ModelBuilder component simplifies model deployment by automating model artifact preparation and SageMaker model creation. We identifi
security.description_vi: Vấn đề với Amazon SageMaker Python SDK - Các vấn đề kiểm tra tính toàn vẹn artifact mô hình (CVE-2026-8596 & CVE-2026-8597) — Bulletin ID: 2026-031-AWS, Ngày xuất bản: 05/14/2026 13:00 PM PDT.

security.title: CVE-2026-7424 - Integer Underflow in DHCPv6 Sub-Option Parser in FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP
security.description: Bulletin ID: 2026-022-AWS Scope: AWS Content Type: Important (requires attention) Publication Date: 2026/04/29 12:20 PM PDT Description: FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP is an open-source, scalable TCP/IP stack for FreeRTOS. We identified CVE-2026-7424, where an integer underflow issue in the DHCPv6 sub-option parser could allow an adjacent network user to corrupt the device's IPv6 address assignment, DNS config
security.description_vi: CVE-2026-7424 - Integer Underflow trong DHCPv6 Sub-Option Parser trong FreeRTOS-Plus-TCP — Bulletin ID: 2026-022-AWS, Ngày xuất bản: 2026/04/29 12:20 PM PDT.

blog.title: AWS Weekly Roundup: Claude Sonnet 5 on AWS, Amazon WorkSpaces for AI agents, AWS service availability updates, and more (July 6, 2026)
blog.description: A couple of editions ago I wrote about what I find so energizing about working with startups. Last week I got a fresh dose of it: I spent a few days with the AWS Startups team, listening to stories of founders talking about the problems they’re actually solving. One story that stayed with me came […]
blog.description_vi: AWS Weekly Roundup: Claude Sonnet 5 trên AWS, Amazon WorkSpaces cho AI agents, cập nhật khả dụng dịch vụ AWS (July 6, 2026) — Vài kỳ trước tôi viết về điều làm nên AWS Startups team, sau một vài ngày khác với team này.

blog.title: Upgrade Amazon EKS clusters with confidence using Kubernetes version rollbacks
blog.description: Learn how Kubernetes version rollbacks for Amazon EKS let you reverse cluster upgrades within seven days. This new feature provides a safety net for upgrade failures—no cluster rebuilds required—turning Kubernetes version upgrades into a reversible, low-risk operation.
blog.description_vi: Nâng cấp Amazon EKS clusters với tự tin bằng Kubernetes version rollbacks — Tìm hiểu cách Kubernetes version rollbacks cho Amazon EKS cho phép đảo ngược cluster upgrades trong bảy ngày, cung cấp mạng an toàn.

blog.title: Accelerate your infrastructure deployments by up to 4x with AWS CloudFormation Express mode
blog.description: AWS CloudFormation speeds up infrastructure deployment with Express mode, enabling AI agents and developers to receive deployment confirmation in seconds and iterate faster. Available in all commercial Regions at no additional cost.
blog.description_vi: Tăng tốc triển khai infrastructure lên 4 lần với AWS CloudFormation Express mode — AWS CloudFormation tăng tốc triển khai với Express mode, cho AI agents và developers nhận xác nhận triển khai trong vài giây.

blog.title: Amazon EC2 C9g and C9gd instances powered by AWS Graviton5 processors are now available
blog.description: Amazon EC2 C9g and C9gd instances, powered by AWS Graviton5, are now generally available. They deliver up to 25% better compute performance than Graviton4-based instances, 5x larger cache, fastest memory of any processor instances in the cloud, and local NVMe storage options (C9gd).
blog.description_vi: Amazon EC2 C9g và C9gd instances được hỗ trợ bởi AWS Graviton5 processors hiện khả dụng — Amazon EC2 C9g và C9gd instances được hỗ trợ bởi AWS Graviton5 hiện khả dụng chung, cung cấp 25% hiệu suất tính toán tốt hơn.

blog.title: Automate public TLS certificate issuance with ACME support in AWS Certificate Manager
blog.description: AWS Certificate Manager now supports the ACME protocol for public TLS certificates, enabling automated issuance and renewal through any ACMEv2-compatible client on any workload. Administrators get centralized governance, IAM-based access controls, and domain scoping, reducing operational risk as certificate lifetimes continue to reduce.
blog.description_vi: Tự động hóa cấp phát chứng chỉ TLS công khai với ACME support trong AWS Certificate Manager — AWS Certificate Manager giờ hỗ trợ ACME protocol cho public TLS certificates, cho phép cấp phát và gia hạn tự động.

blog.title: AWS Weekly Roundup: Agentic CX designer for Amazon Connect Customer, EC2 AMI Watermarks, Open Governance for MySQL, and more (June 29, 2026)
blog.description: It has been a busy stretch on the AWS Summit circuit. At the New York City Summit, I delivered a workshop called Building AI architectures with AWS Serverless, and it was a lot of fun watching builders wire up agents and serverless services to solve real problems in a single afternoon. This week I am […]
blog.description_vi: AWS Weekly Roundup: Agentic CX designer cho Amazon Connect Customer, EC2 AMI Watermarks, Open Governance cho MySQL (June 29, 2026) — AWS Summit circuit đã bận rộn, tại NYC Summit tôi triển khai workshop Building AI architectures with AWS Serverless.

blog.title: Run isolated sandboxes with full lifecycle control: AWS Lambda introduces MicroVMs
blog.description: AWS launches a new serverless compute primitive, AWS Lambda MicroVMs. VM-level, isolated sandboxes with no shared kernel or resources between sessions. Rapid launch and resume, full lifecycle control, state preservation up to 8 hours, no infrastructure to manage.
blog.description_vi: Chạy isolated sandboxes với full lifecycle control: AWS Lambda giới thiệu MicroVMs — AWS khởi động compute primitive mới, AWS Lambda MicroVMs, VM-level sandboxes với không shared kernel hoặc resources giữa sessions.

blog.title: AWS Weekly Roundup: NY Summit recap, Local Zone in Hanoi, Grok 4.3 in Bedrock, price reductions, and more (June 22, 2026)
blog.description: Last week AWS Summit New York City brought together thousands of customers, partners, and builders for a free, one-day event showcasing the latest in cloud and AI innovation. Dr. Swami Sivasubramanian, VP of Agentic AI at AWS unveiled a stack of AI launches in his keynote, all built around one thesis: agents that compound value […]
blog.description_vi: AWS Weekly Roundup: NY Summit recap, Local Zone ở Hanoi, Grok 4.3 trong Bedrock, giảm giá (June 22, 2026) — Tuần trước AWS Summit New York City quy tụ hàng nghìn khách hàng, đối tác và builders.

blog.title: Announcing Amazon EC2 G7 instances accelerated by NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs
blog.description: Announcing the general availability of Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2) G7 instances, delivering high performance GPU acceleration for AI inference, graphics, and data analytics workloads.
blog.description_vi: Công bố Amazon EC2 G7 instances được tăng tốc bởi NVIDIA RTX PRO 4500 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs — Công bố khả dụng chung của Amazon EC2 G7 instances, cung cấp GPU acceleration hiệu suất cao cho AI inference, graphics.

blog.title: Amazon ECS introduces new high-resolution metrics for faster service auto scaling
blog.description: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) service auto scaling automatically adjusts task counts to meet workload demand with comprehensive scaling policies, including predictive scaling for recurring traffic patterns, scheduled scaling for planned events, and target tracking to scale dynamically on real-time metrics. You can choose proactive scaling by using predictive scaling (automatic) and
blog.description_vi: Amazon ECS giới thiệu high-resolution metrics mới cho faster service auto scaling — Amazon ECS service auto scaling tự động điều chỉnh task counts để đáp ứng workload demand với comprehensive scaling policies.

incidents.title: Service disruption: Increased Error Rates
incidents.description: We are providing an update on the ongoing service disruption. The Middle East (UAE) Region (ME-CENTRAL-1) has suffered damage as a result of the conflict in the Middle East and is currently unable to reliably support customer applications. incidents.title: Service disruption: Increased Connectivity Issues and API Error Rates
incidents.description: We are providing an update on the ongoing service disruption. The Middle East (Bahrain) Region (ME-SOUTH-1) has suffered damage due to the conflict in the Middle East and is currently unavailable. Customers should recover their resources in other Regions from remote backups. Relevant billing operations are currently suspended while we restore normal operations in this AWS Region. incidents.title: Service impact: Increased Connectivity Issues and API Error Rates
incidents.description: We are providing an update on the ongoing service disruptions affecting the AWS Middle East (Bahrain) Region (ME-SOUTH-1). We continue to make progress on recovery efforts across multiple workstreams. With the immediate phase of this event now better understood, we are moving to a more targeted communication model. incidents.title: Service disruption: Increased Error Rates
incidents.description: We are providing an update on the ongoing service disruptions affecting the AWS Middle East (UAE) Region (ME-CENTRAL-1). We continue to make progress on recovery efforts across multiple workstreams. For Amazon S3, we are seeing continued improvement in PUT and LIST availability. Newly written objects are now able to be successfully retrieved, and we continue to work on reducing GET error rates for

incidents.title: Service impact: Increased Connectivity Issues and API Error Rates
incidents.description: Recovery efforts in the affected Availability Zone (mes1-az2) in the ME-SOUTH-1 Region are ongoing, with the situation remaining consistent with our last update. We have no change to expected timelines for fully restoring power and connectivity. While progress is being made, significant work remains before full restoration is complete.
